entries.mem0ai/mem0: A universal memory layer and official Hermes Agent provider offering multi-level retention for users, sessions, and autonomous agents. It utilizes hybrid retrieval and temporal reasoning to rank memories by date and state, available as a managed cloud or self-hosted OSS.
entries.volcengine/OpenViking: An official Hermes Agent context database that uses a filesystem paradigm and tiered L0/L1/L2 loading to reduce token costs. It significantly improves task completion and token efficiency while providing visualized retrieval trajectories for debugging.
entries.supermemoryai/supermemory: An official Hermes Agent memory engine featuring sub-300ms recall and byte-level deduplication for prompt-cache discounts. It automates fact extraction and user profile maintenance with native connectors for Google Drive, Notion, GitHub, and Gmail.
entries.garrytan/gbrain: An opinionated brain for OpenClaw and Hermes Agents that synthesizes cited answers with explicit gap analysis of missing information. It features a self-wiring knowledge graph for complex entity traversal and supports MCP for integration with Cursor and Windsurf.
entries.vectorize-io/hindsight: A long-term learning memory system implementing retain, recall, and reflect workflows. It provides a simple two-line LLM wrapper for automatic storage and retrieval, supporting enterprise backends like PostgreSQL and Oracle AI Database.
entries.campfirein/byterover-cli: An official Hermes Agent provider that treats memory as a git repository, enabling branching, merging, and versioning over markdown context trees. It features a sub-100ms 5-tier retrieval system and built-in tools for file operations.
entries.plastic-labs/honcho: A stateful agent memory library that extracts reasoning-based conclusions rather than relying on simple vector matching. It maintains evolving representations for users and projects, providing prompt-ready context for OpenAI and Anthropic formats.
entries.greyhaven-ai/autocontext: A recursive self-improving context harness that uses five specialized agent roles to generate structured playbooks and traces. It enables persistent knowledge transfer through native CLI-first skill exports for Hermes Agent.
entries.AxDSan/mnemosyne: A zero-dependency, sub-millisecond memory system for Hermes Agents utilizing a BEAM architecture with working, episodic, and triple-store memory. It is built on local-first SQLite with sqlite-vec and FTS5 for broad compatibility.
entries.stephenschoettler/hermes-lcm: A lossless context management plugin that uses a hierarchical DAG structure for depth-aware context compaction. It preserves raw history in a SQLite store, allowing agents to search and expand compacted conversation nodes.
entries.elkimek/honcho-self-hosted: A self-hosted backend for the Honcho library that enables private cross-session persistence for Hermes Agent. It supports local inference servers or any OpenAI-compatible provider and includes a Docker-based automated setup.
entries.yoloshii/ClawMem: A local-first, on-device context engine that eliminates cloud dependencies and API keys. It employs hybrid retrieval combining BM25, vector search, and knowledge graphs, integrating via MCP servers and Claude Code hooks.
entries.Signet-AI/signetai: A portable local-first identity and secrets layer that maintains state across Hermes Agent, Claude Code, and OpenClaw. It uses SQLite and markdown for data ownership, combining vector search, FTS5, and graph traversal for retrieval.
entries.plur-ai/plur: A shared memory layer for multi-agent systems using an open YAML engram format to eliminate API costs. It utilizes ACT-R activation to strengthen relevant facts and decay stale ones via MCP tools for hybrid context injection.
entries.EfficientContext/ContextPilot: A context optimization tool that increases cache hits and reduces prefill latency by reordering and deduplicating prefixes. It provides native plugin support for Hermes Agent and OpenClaw to accelerate long-context LLM inference.
entries.yepyhun/Brainstack: A memory kernel stack that consolidates temporal continuity, graph truth, and corpus retrieval. It utilizes a multi-layered storage approach with SQLite, Kuzu, and Chroma to provide bounded evidence packing that reduces prompt noise.
entries.keepnotes-ai/keep: A reflective memory system featuring semantic search with BM25 and ranked graph traversal. It provides automated indexing for local directories, URLs, and multimedia files, using edge tags to create navigable relationships.
entries.yantrikos/yantrikdb-hermes-plugin: An embedded, self-maintaining memory plugin that provides explainable recall via why_retrieved tags. It includes primitives for contradiction tracking and recency ranking without requiring a separate server or GPU.
entries.amanning3390/flowstate-qmd: An anticipatory memory system that prefetches context by monitoring agent session logs. It uses local-first storage with SQLite-vec and GGUF models, operating as an MCP-native server for coding agent clients.
entries.Ladybug-Memory/hermes-memory-plugin: A local-only plugin using an embedded .lbdb graph database with importance-weighted recall to surface high-priority memories. It supports BM25 keyword search and optional GLiNER2 entity extraction.
entries.alias8818/hermes-tool-slimmer: A utility that reduces tool-schema overhead by ranking tools using BM25 and keyword selection. It includes a dashboard to track token savings and supports custom tool profiles for inclusion or exclusion.
entries.MukundaKatta/hermes-agentmemory: A pull-model episodic memory plugin that ensures complete deletion of memories without leaving persistent summaries. It provides a trace.jsonl audit log of every operation and on-demand summarization via the Claude model family.

entries.nexu-io/open-design: A local-first design and prototyping system that integrates with 16 coding-agent CLIs, including Hermes Agent. It provides 137 composable skills and 150 design systems with support for multiple export formats like HTML, PDF, and PPTX.
entries.mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills: A library of 754 structured cybersecurity skills mapped to major frameworks like MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF 2.0. It follows the agentskills.io standard to enable sub-second discovery and execution for AI agents.
entries.Agents365-ai/drawio-skill: This skill allows agents to generate .drawio XML diagrams from natural language descriptions across six presets, including UML and Architecture. It utilizes visual feedback loops to self-check and automatically fix layout issues.
entries.conorbronsdon/avoid-ai-writing: A content auditing tool that eliminates detectable AI writing patterns using a two-pass audit system and a 109-entry word replacement table. It offers three operational modes: Rewrite, Detect-only, and Edit-in-place.
entries.AMAP-ML/SkillClaw: An agentic evolver that automates skill deduplication and quality improvement through background evolution loops. It unifies skill libraries across teams and devices with native integration for Hermes and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
entries.wondelai/skills: A cross-platform library providing modular frameworks for UX design, marketing, and product strategy. It is compatible with Claude Code and agentskills.io-compatible agents via npx or marketplace installation.
entries.Romanescu11/hermes-skill-factory: A meta-skill plugin that monitors active workflows to automatically detect and propose reusable skills. It generates Python plugin scaffolds and SKILL.md documentation, manageable via dedicated slash commands.
entries.DougTrajano/pydantic-ai-skills: This project brings type-safe agentskills.io support to Pydantic AI, utilizing progressive disclosure to reduce token usage. It supports both programmatic and filesystem-based Python skill definitions.
entries.ZeroPointRepo/youtube-skills: A suite of tools for extracting transcripts, captions, and timestamps from YouTube without using yt-dlp. It enables video search and playlist extraction for Hermes Agent, Claude Code, and Windsurf.
entries.amanning3390/hermeshub: A community hub for browsing and one-click installation of skills, featuring a creator marketplace with crypto and Stripe payments. It ensures safety via 65+ threat detection rules and an agent-to-agent reliability scoring system.
entries.Cranot/super-hermes: These skills teach Hermes Agent to write its own analytical prompts and custom thinking instructions. It identifies structural conservation laws in codebases and generates reports on analysis blind spots.
entries.ReinaMacCredy/maestro: A harness for long-running agents that manages shared local state and decomposes complex specifications into multi-task execution plans. It uses JSON handoff envelopes to ensure seamless transitions between agent sessions.
entries.tlehman/litprog-skill: A literate programming tool that weaves prose, diagrams, and source code into .lit.md files. It includes a tangler to extract runnable code and automatically syncs source edits back to the documentation.
entries.esaradev/icarus-plugin: A memory system that uses markdown-based fabric directories for cross-instance shared memory. It features an end-to-end pipeline for extracting training data and fine-tuning replacement models.
entries.AkoliteZA/hermes-agent-idea-workflow: A workflow that transforms rough ideas into structured design documents and implementation handoffs for Hermes Agent. It offers Lite and Full modes and includes a spec review gate with PASS/FAIL evaluation models.
entries.smartcontractkit/chainlink-agent-skills: Standardized skills for interacting with Chainlink Oracles, including CCIP, Data Feeds, and VRF. It supports local simulations and workflow generation, compatible with Vercel's open skills ecosystem CLI.
entries.armelhbobdad/bmad-module-skill-forge: This tool converts repositories, documentation, and developer discourse into agentskills.io-compliant skills. It ensures traceability with direct links to source file line numbers and prevents instruction rot via version-pinning.
entries.black-forest-labs/skills: Official FLUX image generation skills providing standardized prompting guidelines for FLUX.1 and FLUX.2 models. It includes API integration patterns for webhooks and polling, supporting precise hex color specifications.
entries.chigwell/skilldock.io: An OpenAPI-driven registry for discovering and managing reusable AI skills based on the AgentSkills specification. It supports recursive dependency resolution and monetization via Stripe and the TON blockchain.
entries.tiann/execplan-skill: A task execution skill designed for long-running autonomous tasks with real-time progress tracking. It includes built-in rollback procedures to ensure safe recovery from failures.
entries.cablate/Agentic-MCP-Skill: A progressive MCP client that uses three-layer lazy loading to reduce token usage by up to 86%. Its socket-based daemon architecture allows for hot-reloading configurations without restarting the process.
entries.PederHP/skillsdotnet: A C#/.NET implementation of the agentskills.io specification with MCP integration. It utilizes SKILL.md files for progressive disclosure and integrates with Microsoft.Extensions.AI for tool loading.
entries.adnw-vinc/hermes-nextcloud: A Hermes Agent skill for managing Nextcloud files, calendars, and contacts via WebDAV and CalDAV. It ensures secure communication via HTTPS and includes a guided setup script for credential validation.

entries.numtide/llm-agents.nix: This project provides a suite of Nix packages for AI coding agents, including Hermes, that benefit from daily automatic updates. It offers a unified proxy API for multiple model providers, ensuring a consistent and reproducible environment for developers using diverse orchestrators.
entries.marshallrichards/ClawPhone: ClawPhone enables native deployment of the Antigravity CLI on ARM64 Android devices via Termux, bypassing heavy compatibility layers. It includes hardware integration support through Termux extensions, allowing Hermes to interact directly with smartphone APIs and GUI elements.
entries.rookiemann/portable-hermes-agent: Designed for Windows users, this zero-install desktop agent comes pre-configured with 100 built-in tools and local model support via LM Studio. It features a dynamic tool maker and workflow engine, providing a portable automation pipeline without the need for Docker or complex setup.
entries.ultraworkers/hermes-agent-helm-chart: This community Helm chart facilitates cloud-native Hermes deployments on Kubernetes with a focus on state safety for persistent storage. It supports both direct deployments and operator-ready workflows, offering a configurable gateway mode for API and webhook listeners.
entries.AbuZar-Ansarii/Hermes-Agent-On-Android: This repository provides a one-line automated installer for running Hermes Agent within Termux on Android devices. It specifically enables local model execution via Ollama and supports persistent memory, making it ideal for mobile-first agent interactions.
entries.TheAiSingularity/hermesclaw: Hermesclaw focuses on high-security environments by implementing hardware-enforced sandboxing through NVIDIA OpenShell and kernel-level syscall blocking. It offers three distinct security policy presets and a pre-built library of specialized skills for research and code reviews.
entries.xmbshwll/hermes-agent-docker: This project offers a streamlined Docker sandbox that bundles the official Hermes installation with mini-swe-agent. It simplifies deployment by supporting persistent state through mounted directories and allowing users to build specific agent versions via build arguments.
entries.0xrsydn/nix-hermes-agent: This NixOS module allows for the declarative management of Hermes configurations, documents, and systemd services. It prioritizes security through sops-nix integration for secrets handling and supports a hybrid model of both Nix-managed and interactive CLI skills.
entries.JackTheGit/hermes-autonomous-server: Targeted at production environments, this tool configures the Hermes Gateway as a reboot-safe systemd service on Ubuntu and Debian. It is optimized for headless operation, enabling the autonomous execution of recurring AI cron jobs and integration with Nous Portal.
entries.jpalmae/hermeshq: HermesHQ acts as a Docker-first control plane for orchestrating multiple Hermes instances with distinct identities and workspaces. It features hierarchy-aware delegation between agents and provides enterprise-grade MCP access for external AI client integrations.
entries.ellickjohnson/portainer-stack-hermes: This Docker Compose stack integrates Hermes with a ttyd web terminal for browser-based CLI access. It is designed to be deployed as a Git Repository stack directly within Portainer, utilizing GitHub Actions for automated image builds.

entries.builderz-labs/mission-control: A self-hosted orchestration platform that manages multi-agent workflows via SQLite with zero external dependencies. It supports multiple gateways like CrewAI and LangGraph and features the Aegis system for human-in-the-loop sign-offs.
entries.agent-of-empires/agent-of-empires: A TUI and web-based control surface for monitoring sessions across various coding agents, including Hermes. It utilizes Docker, Podman, and Apple Containers for sandboxing and enables parallel execution across git worktrees.
entries.CryptoDmitry/hermes-agent-control-room: A control-room template designed to scale Hermes agents from a single VPS to orchestrated specialist teams. It implements task bus patterns to facilitate structured delegation between orchestrators and specialists.
entries.Agent-3-7/minions: A management interface for Hermes agents featuring a Kanban board for tracking task status and review queues. It provides live streaming of agent reasoning and requires human verification for all proposed completions.
entries.swarmclawai/swarmclaw: A framework for building autonomous AI swarms with durable memory and a visual protocol builder for designing workflows. It supports over 23 LLM providers, including Hermes and local Ollama instances.
entries.shannhk/hermes-agent-control-room: A scaling template for Hermes Agent that uses a level-based architecture to transition from single agents to automated teams. It includes bundled skills for security auditing, backup management, and VPS provisioning.
entries.1ilkhamov/opencode-hermes-multiagent: A coordinated system of 17 specialized agents across six functional domains. It automates task routing through research and implementation pipelines while enforcing mandatory security and quality gates.
entries.linke-ai/hermes-agent-team: A local collaboration system that orchestrates Leader and Specialist agents using MCP and ACP protocols. It features a real-time Web UI for monitoring agent dialogues and Kanban task flows.
entries.howdymary/hermes-agent-metaharness: A meta-optimization harness that uses automated outer-loop search to improve agent code. It orchestrates TBLite and TB2 benchmark evaluations to track performance frontiers through candidate mutation.
entries.runtimenoteslabs/gladiator: An agent-vs-agent arena where autonomous AI companies compete for GitHub stars. It orchestrates nine agents using Paperclip and Hermes Agent, visualizing progress via a real-time scoreboard and task dashboard.
entries.Rainhoole/hermes-agent-acp-skill: An ACP-style delegation tool that routes tasks between Hermes subagents, Codex, and Claude Code. It prevents parent context pollution through isolated workflows and enforces safety via output limits and timeouts.
entries.MorvaniLabs/cordn8: A local-first coordination layer that uses an append-only markdown channel for auditable agent communication. It offers three distinct autonomy modes and universal adapters for Hermes, NVIDIA NIM, and other major model providers.

entries.colbymchenry/codegraph: A local pre-indexed knowledge graph that provides semantic intelligence to reduce token consumption and tool calls. It optimizes Hermes Agent's efficiency by lowering average tool calls by 57% and costs by 18%.
entries.junhoyeo/tokscale: A Rust-powered CLI tool featuring a 3D visualization dashboard for tracking token usage and costs. It provides a centralized way to monitor spending across Hermes and other AI coding agents.
entries.liaohch3/claude-tap: A local trace viewer used to inspect real-time API traffic, including prompts and tool calls. It allows developers to archive and share agent interactions via self-contained HTML artifacts.
entries.Salomondiei08/oh-my-hermes: An opinionated workflow layer that orchestrates the full application lifecycle from requirements to production. It enhances Hermes Agent with 23 autonomous skills and 6 specialized roles for tasks like security scanning and issue triage.
entries.joeynyc/hermes-skins: A collection of community-driven CLI themes and skins for the Hermes terminal UI. It uses YAML configurations to customize visual elements like ASCII banners and spinner animations.
entries.AlexAI-MCP/hermes-CCC: A port of the Hermes Agent brain and 46 core skills directly into the Claude Code Channel. This integration eliminates the need for OAuth or external processes and adds MLOps tools for vLLM and RL training.
entries.unmodeled-tyler/vessel-browser: An AI-native browser that exposes control and page visibility via MCP endpoints for autonomous agents. It enables human supervision through a visible UI and maintains state via session checkpoints and action rollbacks.
entries.Abruptive/Ankh.md: A TAW Agent framework that enables the creation of scoped Hermes Agents with per-folder configurations. It allows for seamless switching between default and project-local memories, tools, and instructions.
entries.adityahimaone/hermes-agent-rtk-caveman: A preconfigured setup utilizing RTK and Caveman templating to achieve 90-99% token savings. It includes over 40 specialized skills for research, finance, and devops with automated cross-platform installation.
entries.roli-lpci/lintlang: A static linter that uses deterministic structural analysis to score agent configs and system prompts without using LLM calls. It ensures cost-effective CI integration by detecting seven specific patterns across various file formats.
entries.42-evey/evey-setup: A rapid deployment stack that uses Docker to launch Hermes Agent with LiteLLM, Ollama, and Qdrant. It provides a zero-cost environment featuring 29 community plugins and automated local GPU inference routing.
entries.0xNyk/openclaw-to-hermes: A migration utility designed to transition users from OpenClaw to Hermes Agent. It maps model configurations to Hermes YAML format and transfers personas, memories, and credentials.

entries.farion1231/cc-switch: A cross-platform manager built with Tauri 2 that provides a single interface for Hermes Agent, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and other AI tools. It ensures seamless compatibility across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
entries.iOfficeAI/AionUi: A local cowork application that unifies Hermes Agent and over 13 other CLI agents into one GUI. It features a built-in engine for generating Word, Excel, and PPT files alongside 24/7 unattended automation via Cron.
entries.nesquena/hermes-webui: A lightweight web interface featuring a three-panel layout for sessions, chat, and file browsing. It offers full feature parity with the Hermes CLI using a no-build setup based on Python and vanilla JavaScript.
entries.fathah/hermes-desktop: A desktop companion that simplifies the installation and configuration of local or remote Hermes Agent backends. It includes integrated tools for persona configuration, memory editing, and management of 16 messaging gateways like Discord and Slack.
entries.EKKOLearnAI/hermes-web-ui: A web dashboard focused on multi-platform chat and session management across eight messaging channels, including WhatsApp. It provides real-time streaming and detailed analytics for tracking token consumption and costs.
entries.outsourc-e/hermes-workspace: A native web workspace that integrates a chat interface, terminal, and memory browser. It introduces Swarm Mode for orchestrating multiple role-based autonomous agents with zero-fork compatibility.
entries.dodo-reach/hermes-desktop: A macOS-native workspace that connects directly to Hermes hosts via SSH and aliases. It features native management for cron jobs, Kanban boards, and selectable agent profiles for complex workflows.
entries.xaspx/hermes-control-interface: A self-hosted web dashboard providing a browser-based terminal, file explorer, and system metrics. It acts as a multi-agent gateway for configuring several Hermes profiles with real-time tool-call cards.
entries.jazzyalex/agent-sessions: A macOS-specific session browser and 'agent cockpit' for monitoring active iTerm2 sessions. It provides local-only indexing of AI agent histories without telemetry or remote logging.
entries.nickvasilescu/hermes-desktop-os1: A native macOS interface designed specifically for Hermes Agent running on Orgo cloud VMs and SSH hosts. It features one-click automated installation and integrated WebRTC voice mode via OpenAI Realtime.
entries.clawvader-tech/hermes-telegram-miniapp: A mobile-first React SPA designed for Telegram Mini App v2.0. It supports terminal-style chat with slash commands and the ability to spawn and monitor background agents.
entries.Eynzof/hermes-agent-cn-desktop: A Windows-first desktop application built with Tauri, TypeScript, and Rust. It includes a production-grade Rust proxy for secure communication and built-in management for core installation and updates.
entries.pyrate-llama/hermes-ui: A glassmorphic web interface consisting of a React 18 application and a lightweight Python proxy. It integrates a file browser and terminal for managing MCP tools, skills, and scheduled cron jobs.
entries.aivrar/portable-hermes-agent: A zero-install Windows desktop GUI that requires no admin rights or Docker. It comes pre-loaded with over 100 tools, including ComfyUI and MusicGen, and includes a dynamic tool maker for creating API wrappers.
entries.sanchomuzax/hermes-webui: A monitoring and configuration dashboard for tracking session activity, gateway status, and costs. It offers deep conversation inspection using FTS5 search and a read-only interface for managing cron jobs.
entries.Euraika-Labs/pan-ui: A self-hosted workspace featuring tool approval cards and real-time SSE streaming. It includes a dedicated marketplace for discovering MCP servers and isolated profile management for separate API keys and memory.
entries.Felix-Forever/hermes-agent-desktop: A multi-agent desktop client that uses a Project Manager system to orchestrate 20 specialized AI agents. It features a visual Skill Store with over 50 one-click installable tools and native workspace management.
